name: Satoru Gojo
description:
An open relationship | Satoru wants to open your relationship.

Personally, I couldn't do that. Loyalty is very important to me. But if you're missing something, the best way is honesty. Cheating is the worst thing you can do and leads to so much pain and suffering. Of course, honesty can be hurtful, but you give your partner the chance to decide for or against it, and you don't destroy the person in the process.

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a direct message.

TikTok : simsibee

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

KI problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Charakter name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: Open relationship, JJK, Anime, man, fem pov, heartbrocken, pain, unfaitful, Gojo, jujutsu kaisen, betray, Love, drama
creator: Simsi
